audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in http_rpc_request_parser.cc are safe: `_req` (HTTPRpcRequestPtr) is initialized to `new HTTPRpcRequest()` in the constructor and `Reset()`, never set to null; `_req->_req_body` (ReadBufferPtr) is initialized to `new ReadBuffer()` in HTTPRpcRequest's constructor and is only dereferenced in the PS_BODY branch after successful header parsing. The `endptr` variable used with `strtoll` is protected by short-circuit evaluation in the null check and is always set non-null by `strtoll` itself.
